prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-TBPHDBSLFHAN-9P-BL Product Type: TOOL_BELT Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 9 Pocket Tool Belt Heavy Duty Suede Leather Fits Hammer And Nails - Blue Description: The Universal Tool Blue Tool Belt is a great addition to any construction worker, crafter or hobbyist.

This belt is constructed of durable high quality suede, and features reinforced stainless steel rivets as well as double stitching so you can count on it to stand the test of time. It comes with 2 large main pockets (about 7.75" deep) which are great for storing hand tools. It also has 2 medium pockets (about 4.75" deep) which are ideal for storing smaller tools and supplies like drill bits, screwdrivers, nails and more.

Additionally this belt has 9 more pockets located throughout the belt including a swinging hammer loop holder, a knife/cutter sheath and a dedicated tape measure holder. The attached belt is adjustable for custom comfort and fit, and will fit waists up to 46". It has a conventional quick release buckle (about 2" wide) that makes the belt easy to put on and remove quickly.

This is a must-have tool belt for anyone looking to keep their tools handy. Search Terms: tool carriers tool organizers worksman tool belts hobby tool holder construction tool belt Features: - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of High Quality Blue Suede with Double Stitching | Reinforced Stainless Steel Rivets - 4 MAIN POCKETS - 2 Large Pockets 7.75" Deep to Store Hand Tools and Items with Long Handles | 2 Medium Pockets 4.75" Deep to Store Small Tools and Supplies - 9 ADDITIONAL POCKETS - Swinging Hammer Loop Holder, Knife/Cutter Sheath and Dedicated Tape Measure Holder - ADJUSTABLE BELT - Fits Waists up to 46" and Adjusts for Custom Comfort and Fit - QUICK RELEASE BUCKLE - 2" Wide PVC Conventional Buckle Makes Belt Easy to Put On and Remove Quickly === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 9-Pocket Blue Suede Tool Belt
